title: Codex PreToolUse Hook Deny Output
description: Stdout JSON payload to deny a tool call in Codex PreToolUse hooks. Exit code 2 with reason on stderr is the alternative deny mechanism. Exit 0 with no output means allow.

hookEventName.description: Must be 'PreToolUse' for this hook event.

permissionDecision.description: 'deny' to block, 'allow' to explicitly permit (with optional updatedInput).

updatedInput.description: Rewritten tool input arguments (only with permissionDecision='allow').
